title: Modify Shape
description: Modify an existing airfoil shape by updating specific control points using linear sampling from provided bounds.

base_csv.description: Path to the original shape CSV.

pt_idx.description: List of control point indices to modify (0-indexed).

values.description: List of [x, y, radius, edgy] for each index in pt_idx. Each value can be a float or [lo, hi] for linear sampling.

name.description: Name for the new shape version.
